page: Amazon Web Services m8idn.metal-48xl is a bare-metal, general-purpose server instance powered by dedicated Intel x86_64 processors. It features 96 physical cores and 192 vCPUs operating at a clock speed of 3.9 GHz. The system is equipped with 768.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per physical core.

This instance includes high-capacity local storage consisting of 11,400 GB of NVMe SSD instance store volumes. It is optimized for both local storage performance and network throughput, delivering a baseline network bandwidth of 300 Gbps. The combination of high-speed local NVMe storage and high-bandwidth networking supports data-intensive operations without external storage bottlenecks.

As a bare-metal instance, the m8idn.metal-48xl offers high resource density and direct hardware access, eliminating virtualization overhead. This makes it a cost-efficient choice for workloads requiring predictable, sustained performance across massive CPU and memory allocations. However, the lack of integrated GPU acceleration limits its utility for heavy machine learning training workloads, positioning it instead as a high-throughput compute and storage platform.

The hardware profile is designed for demanding enterprise workloads. It is highly suitable for large-scale relational databases, high-performance web serving, distributed data processing, and network-intensive applications that benefit from direct hardware access and substantial local NVMe storage.
description: Amazon Web Services m8idn.metal-48xl is a bare-metal, general-purpose server instance designed for high-throughput workloads. Powered by dedicated Intel x86_64 processors, it delivers 192 vCPUs across 96 physical cores running at 3.9 GHz, paired with 768.0 GB of system memory. The instance is equipped with 11,400 GB of local NVMe SSD storage and features a baseline network bandwidth of 300 Gbps. This combination of high-speed local storage and high-bandwidth networking makes it highly efficient for data-intensive applications. As a bare-metal configuration, it eliminates virtualization overhead, offering direct hardware access for predictable performance. The server is optimized for enterprise databases, distributed data processing, and network-heavy workloads, though the absence of dedicated GPU hardware limits its suitability for deep learning acceleration.

tagline: A bare-metal server delivering high-speed local NVMe storage, massive CPU core density, and high-bandwidth networking for enterprise workloads.
